underlying_goal: Continue developing an RSS Reader application, fixing bugs and adding features including batch delete subscriptions, search functionality, mark all read, and settings pages
friction_detail: Search functionality was not working - Claude identified the issue and fixed it by connecting the search event handling in App.vue to HomeView
brief_summary: User continued RSS reader development; Claude fixed broken search, added mark-all-read, batch delete, and settings pages, but user reported search still wasn't working at end of session.
